author: ShadyTidus
name: ShadyPulse
short: Comprehensive health monitoring for bot, services, and cogs
description: Monitor bot health (latency, uptime), external HTTP services, and other cogs. Features dashboard command, alert channels, uptime statistics, and optional cog auto-reload on failure. Detects cog crashes and can automatically attempt to reload them.
install_msg:
ShadyPulse installed!

Commands:
- `[p]pulse` - View health dashboard
- `[p]uptime` - Show bot uptime
- `[p]shadypulse` - Admin configuration

Setup:
1. Set alert channel: `[p]shadypulse alertchannel #channel`
2. Add HTTP services: `[p]shadypulse http add <name> <url>`
3. Monitor cogs: `[p]shadypulse cog add <CogName>`
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores service status history and configuration. No user data is collected.
